---
title: "Dehdab et al. (2025) — LLM-based Radiology Report Extraction"
description: "Paper notes on a predecessor study using LLMs to extract structured data from radiology reports"
date: 2025-10-01
categories: [paper notes, NLP, radiology, LLM]
draft: true
---

::: {.note-meta}
🌿 Sprout · Last tended <span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Month Year</span>
:::

## Citation

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Dehdab A, et al. [Full title]. *Academic Radiology*. 2025. DOI: [link]</span>

## Summary

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? 2-3 paragraph summary of the paper. What did they do? What was the key finding?</span>

## What I found useful

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? What specific methods, design choices, or findings are relevant to your own work?</span>

## Limitations & gaps

<span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? What didn't they address? Where does your planned work extend beyond theirs?</span>

## Connection to my work

This paper is a direct predecessor to the [agentic Lémann pipeline](/projects/mre-pipeline/index.qmd) I'm developing. Key differences in my approach:

- <span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Difference 1 — e.g., agentic tool-calling vs. direct extraction</span>
- <span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Difference 2 — e.g., human-in-the-loop for uncertain cases</span>
- <span style="background:#fff3cd;color:#856404;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.9em;border:1px dashed #ffc107;">?? Difference 3 — e.g., different scoring system (Lémann vs. whatever they used)</span>

## Related

- [Clinical AI pipelines](/notes/concepts/clinical-ai-pipelines.qmd)
- [What is the Lémann Index?](/notes/concepts/lemann-index.qmd)
